value.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has an innate connection to the archotechs. This connection might awaken if [PAWN_pronoun] experiences something related to Mastery, permanently transforming [PAWN_objective] into a powerful psycaster.\n\nMastery can be achieved by reaching 15 in a skill, reaching psylink level 4 or higher, or creating a legendary item.

[PAWN_nameDef] has an innate connection to the archotechs. This connection might awaken if [PAWN_pronoun] experiences something related to Misery, permanently transforming [PAWN_objective] into a powerful psycaster.\n\nMisery can be achieved by experiencing a mental break 2% chance, an extreme mental break 50% chance, or gaining an inspiration during catharsis.

[PAWN_nameDef] has an innate connection to the archotechs. This connection might awaken if [PAWN_pronoun] experiences something related to Love, permanently transforming [PAWN_objective] into a powerful psycaster.\n\nLove can be achieved by bonding with an animal 50% chance, entering a romantic relationship 50% chance, getting engaged 75% chance, getting married 100% chance, having 500 positive opinion of other people, or if a child they are related to reaches maturity.

[PAWN_nameDef] has an innate connection to the archotechs. This connection might awaken if [PAWN_pronoun] experiences something related to Loss, permanently transforming [PAWN_objective] into a powerful psycaster.\n\nLoss can be achieved by having kin or a romantic related individual with 60+ positive or negative opinion die 50-100% chance based on opinion score, a bonded animal dies 50% chance, a person they have a 100 opinion of dies on the map or in a caravan 50% chance, or if kin or a romantic related individual with 60+ positive or negative opinion is banished 2% chance.

[PAWN_nameDef] has an innate connection to the archotechs. This connection might awaken if [PAWN_pronoun] experiences something related to Life, permanently transforming [PAWN_objective] into a powerful psycaster.\n\nLife can be achieved by aging 1% chance on birthday, becoming immune to a illness that's progressed to life-threatening stage 20% chance, being resurrected, or giving birth 33% chance.

[PAWN_nameDef] has an innate connection to the archotechs. This connection might awaken if [PAWN_pronoun] experiences something related to Death, permanently transforming [PAWN_objective] into a powerful psycaster.\n\nDeath can be achieved by dying (they will immediately resurrect upon death).
